channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Between 4.30 - 10.30 pm today, bags of rubbish and loose rubbish have been dumped on the pavement by the bins. When this happens, foxes spread the rubbish along the New River creating litter and hazards to the wildlife.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whittington Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area around roundabout and under A2 Bridge - full of litter & fly-tipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Hi there, The area next to the round requires regular cleaning. Please ensure sweeping is done twice a week at least. It's in a pretty bad state atm - please arrange cleaning. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aldeburgh Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area full of litter, 22nd March
item.description:
Hi there, The area next to the Car MOT is full of fly-tipping - please clean it and keep monitoring it. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aldeburgh Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping next to Alan's Plants, 22nd March
item.description:
Hi there, This area keeps having lots of litter - fly-tipping spot. Please clean it and keep monitoring it regularly. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dupree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal encampment of Vans parked on Rowanwood Ave, 22nd March
item.description:
4 vans parked on the road for weeks being slept in, using bushes to relieve themselves and dump rubbish in conservation area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Rowanwood Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Bin at Gurdon Road, 22nd March
item.description:
Hi there, There is an overflow bin at Gurdon Road that has not been changed since Friday. Can this be addressed asap. This keeps happening and as far as I'm aware this bin ought to be changed daily. Please ensure this is done. Best, Lidia

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dupree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red man in broken, 22nd March
item.description:
Is has came out

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44-46, Cranbourn Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Empting the boot of his car in communal bins on Sunday 1st March at 11.15am

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ogilby Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light #9 not working, 22nd March
item.description:
Street light #9 not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Eton Avenue, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Fly-tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Finsbury Park Avenue, Harringay, Greater London

item.title: Cardboard boxes and plastic flytipped - elcot avenue, 22nd March
item.description:
Please come and take all this waste away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Please take all this away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14-16, Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on utility unit, 22nd March
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Personal belongings dumped., 22nd March
item.description:
It appears that someone has left a large pile of personal belongings outside a closed down chemist on Cheltenham Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge potholes and cracks in road, 22nd March
item.description:
The potholes are ginormous on Selbourne Road and have been there for over a year. Multiple potholes potential to cause damage to cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Selborne Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose manhole cover, 22nd March
item.description:
Loose manhole cover - possibly 2x different ones - at the junction of Paul Street - Clere Street - Luke Street. Makes loud noise every time vehicle drives over it, which wakes us up at night disturbing our sleep, and disturbs the peace during the day.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paul Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: HUGE amount of street rubbish on wall, 22nd March
item.description:
HUGE amount of street rubbish on wall on Crystal Palace Parade (Lambeth side). See photo of lots cans. This is dreadful and smelling.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Westow Hill, Upper Norwood, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped black bags Selborne Road, 22nd March
item.description:
Flytipped black bags Selborne Road for removal please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selborne Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big and deep pothole, 22nd March
item.description:
Dangerous pothole located in the centre of the road at the junction of Church Hill, Anerley Road and Westow Hill (Crystal Palace), particularly hazardous when turning onto Church Hill. I hit this pothole on my bike today while following a car around the bend. It is positioned in a blind spot and not visible in time to avoid safely. The impact caused an immediate tyre puncture and could easily have resulted in a serious accident. This presents a significant danger to both cyclists and vehicles and requires urgent repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Church Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
